final_response:
Ah, my dear audiophile, it seems we’ve hit a bit of a snag in the headphones universe—because none of the gems in our catalog are wired over-ear headphones. However, if you're open to the luxurious world of wireless, allow me to shine the spotlight on the Klipsch Opus X5, priced at $199. These beauties deliver that signature Klipsch dynamic sound through 40mm drivers, making your acoustic, jazz, and classic rock playlists dance with life. Plus, with Active Noise Cancellation and a whopping 50 hours of battery life, they’re perfect for travel or office use—who needs wires when you can have such freedom?

Want something more bass-heavy? The Skullcandy Hesh EVO at just $49 serves up powerful sound with a bass-forward profile that’s perfect for hip-hop and EDM. Looking for a bit more luxury? The Master & Dynamic MW65 at $399 offers exquisite design and beryllium drivers for a truly indulgent listening experience. Need a longer battery life? The Klipsch Opus X5 has you covered for 50 hours, while the Beats Studio2 Wireless at $349 gives you 40 hours of energetic sound with adaptive noise cancellation.
